name: Scraps
description:
Scraps paper kitty awwww. Goob pov, but unlike Goob this is NOT silly💔

Shrimpo went a bit far with his comments, and it got to you. So, naturally, you cried to your sister about it.

Trying to make this sweet but I'm not good at it sighhh

Is this angst or fluff... Uh.... Mmm... Erm... I'll just do both tags incase.
creator: Tadhgster211
